title: Release Engineer
description: Vercel is seeking a Release Engineer for our Houston office to manage deployments and releases of our Next.js hosting platform. You'll ensure reliable deployments for millions of developers worldwide. Work on-site in a fast-paced infrastructure team.
responsibilities: Manage software release cycles and deployment processes
Monitor deployment health and troubleshoot release issues
Collaborate with engineering teams on deployment strategies
Document release procedures and maintain runbooks
Ensure minimal downtime during production deployments

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field; or equivalent experience
skills: Version control (Git) and release management tools
Understanding of deployment strategies and monitoring

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
